title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS - 211info
text: CARE OREGON CLUB AT ROCKWOOD BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 454 SE 165th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Fall Hours: Monday-Friday 2pm-6pm Summer Hours: Varies by service Email (360) 954-1428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (360) 954-1428 Main phone Main phone (360) 954-1428 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Ukrainian, Russian, Romanian, French AREA SERVED: City of Gresham (Rockwood) SITE HOURS: Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
